basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Motor Vehicle Inspector Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Recruitment 2026: Mizoram Public Service Commission has released the official notification for 8 Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Mizoram. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years in case of ST/SC candidates or as may be notified by the Government from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: HSLC or above with 3 years course Diploma or above in Mechanical/Automobile Engineering from a recognized Institution. Holding a driving license authorizing to drive Motorcycle with gear and Light Motor Vehicle. Computer Proficiency. Mizo Language Proficiency.
qualification.details: HSLC or above with 3 years course Diploma or above in Mechanical/Automobile Engineering from a recognized Institution. Holding a driving license authorizing to drive Motorcycle with gear and Light Motor Vehicle. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency as prescribed by the Government.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC MVI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) posts is 19th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for the Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) position by the Mizoram Public Service Commission in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the MVI post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed HSLC or equivalent with a 3-year Diploma in Mechanical/Automobile Engineering, a valid driving license for Motorcycle with gear and LMV, and possess computer and Mizo language proficiency.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level-7 in the Pay Matrix, which offers a competitive salary structure as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Mizoram PSC Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the MVI posts?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Motor Vehicle Inspector (MVI) posts will be based on a Direct Recruitment Examination conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the MVI recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying the application fee. Other categories' fee details should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Mizoram PSC?
faq.answer: The official website of the Mizoram Public Service Commission is mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.
